title: Mediterranean Corn Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with sweet corn, perfect as a side dish or snack.
instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix corn kernels, mozzarella cheese, flatbread crumbs, and scallions.
3. In a separate bowl, beat eggs and add salt to taste.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the corn mixture and mix well.
5. Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
